approach: 3-stage pipeline (Parser->Planner->Executor) with recursive-descent SQL parser producing AST nodes, query planner generating logical execution plans (SeqScan->Filter->Join->Aggregate->Project->Sort->Limit), and tree-walking executor. Expression evaluator handles WHERE predicates with SQL 3-value NULL logic. Supports DDL (CREATE/DROP TABLE), DML (INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE), and full SELECT (WHERE with AND/OR/IN/BETWEEN/LIKE/IS NULL, JOIN inner/left via nested loop, GROUP BY + HAVING with COUNT/AVG/SUM/MIN/MAX aggregates, ORDER BY, LIMIT/OFFSET, DISTINCT, subqueries in WHERE IN). All 67 tests pass including 7 integration validation queries.
